text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All right! Today's leg presses are<n>FINISHED!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Man, getting my workout game on<n>just makes
me wanna work out even<n>more!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket catches me off guard<n>with the
sudden question, and I<n>scramble for an answer.
choice_data_list: Heck yeah! No pain, no gain!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
That's what I'm saying! Working out<n>after
getting tired is a different kind of<n>fun!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Okay! More leg presses it is! Here<n>comes
another ten sets! The limit<n>doesn't exist for
meee!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She begins training furiously again, a<n>radiant
smile on her face.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket's determination and<n>stamina sure
are something.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oooh, a drink! Can I really have this?<n>Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But why are you giving this to me?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're totally right! All right, I'm<n>gonna get
my rest game on too!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket leaves without taking<n>the drink. It
seems like she's going to<n>rest as hard as she
trained. Being able<n>to switch from work to play is
an<n>essential skill too.
